text: Moving from the dim, ambiguous hallway into this brightly colored, thought-provoking space, I am struck by a sense of contrast and curiosity. The sterile quiet of the glass and steel exterior gives way to the energetic promise of discovery inside—the ethos of research and development embodied in bold colors and interactive displays. I feel anticipation, as if I've crossed a threshold: from uncertainty and quiet introspection to engagement with ideas and the creativity of minds at work. Being here, I am reminded that every entrance is also an invitation to think differently.
